steps.title: Clear the denominator and form a quadratic
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by $(x+6)$:

$$55 = x(x+6) = x^2 + 6x$$

Rearrange to standard form:

$$x^2 + 6x - 55 = 0$$

steps.title: Factor and solve for the positive solution
steps.content:
Factor by finding two numbers that multiply to $-55$ and add to \$6$. These are \$11$ and $-5$:

$$(x + 11)(x - 5) = 0$$

This gives $x = -11$ or $x = 5$. The positive solution is 5.
